title: phillyrea mucronata var. linearis
intro: Phillyrea mucronata var. linearis, also known as the linear-leaved Phillyrea, is a plant species in the family Oleaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as dyspepsia and flatulence, due to its antispasmodic and carminative effects. The health benefits of Phillyrea mucronata var. linearis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic properties.
